promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. This capsule is for operator navigation and recall, not authority replacement. Keep the wide noncanon shell visible without letting it outrank lower-loop truth, owner-model law, or source-bound active doctrine.

selection_basis.ledger_reason: This batch reduces the postsweep cross-batch packet plus the smallest parent-batch distillate and tension artifacts needed to preserve an operator-facing active kernel.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Emit a compact operator capsule for authority stack, A2 boot hierarchy, current live A1 family map, entropy-lane bottleneck, and outer-shell quarantine.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Broader architecture packet already exists, but is larger than needed for operator recall.

raw_source_reread_reason: This batch explicitly reduces prior reduction artifacts and selected parent-batch distillates and tension maps rather than reopening raw active sources.
notes: This manifest was added during intake-surface integrity cleanup after the batch was observed as a full five-artifact packet lacking MANIFEST.json.
The batch remains two layers removed from original active sources and should be treated as an operator navigation capsule rather than authority replacement.
